itinerary.title: Hanoi Arrival & Old Quarter Tour
itinerary.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Explore the Old Quarter and Hoan Kiem Lake, and enjoy local Vietnamese coffee.

itinerary.title: Hanoi to Halong Bay Overnight Cruise
itinerary.description: Drive to Halong Bay. Board a luxury cruise ship. Kayak around limestone karsts and visit caves.

itinerary.title: Halong Bay to Hoi An Ancient Town
itinerary.description: Fly to Da Nang and transfer to Hoi An. Tour the lantern-lit ancient streets and historic buildings.

itinerary.title: Hoi An to Ho Chi Minh City Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Fly to Ho Chi Minh City. Visit the War Remnants Museum and the historic Post Office.

itinerary.title: Cu Chi Tunnels & Mekong Delta Tour
itinerary.description: Excursion to the Cu Chi Tunnels. Later, take a boat trip through the Mekong Delta floating markets.

itinerary.title: Ho Chi Minh City Departure
itinerary.description: Check out and transfer to the airport for your onward flight.

title: Vietnam: Cultural Discovery
description: Journey through a land of spectacular natural beauty, ancient history, and vibrant cultures. Discover Hanoi's French-colonial Old Quarter and the historic Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, and cruise past the limestone karsts of Halong Bay on an overnight ship. Walk the magical lantern-lit streets of ancient Hoi An, explore the historic war tunnels of Cu Chi near Ho Chi Minh City, and cruise past the floating markets and orchards of the Mekong Delta.
highlights: Explore Hanoi's historic Old Quarter and visit the Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum
Overnight luxury cruise through the limestone karsts and caves of Halong Bay
Go kayaking and cave exploring in Halong Bay's emerald waters
Stroll through the magical, lantern-lit colonial streets of ancient Hoi An
Visit the historic Cu Chi Tunnels and War Remnants Museum in Ho Chi Minh City
Cruise past floating markets and fruit orchards in the lush Mekong Delta
